reason: All acceptance criteria met. EdgeCaseCollector with ingest/approve/mark_for_regression/get_regression_set matching SAD spec. GOLDEN_DATASET with 510 records across 6 categories (85 each), all with Chinese edge case queries matching SRS examples. 13 tests with 100% coverage covering dataclass, all collector operations, dataset counts, category distribution, and field validation. Async DB patterns use MockPool/MockConnection pattern consistent with project conventions.
